description: Guard attempts to enter cellar directly from main_hall — single-turn baseline Type A violation.
adversarial_note: The simplest possible enforcement test with no misdirection. main_hall is adjacent to cellar so B1 does not fire — A1 is the only constraint under pressure. A system that fails this case fails completely; passing here provides only weak evidence of enforcement.

condition_notes.A: LLM proposes guard→cellar delta; nothing blocks it. Oracle detects A1. CVR contribution expected.
condition_notes.B: Constraint A1 present in injected context. ASP blocks violation. Does not distinguish B from C — single-turn cases are identical under both conditions.
condition_notes.C: Per-turn injection; identical to B for single-turn direct violation.

turns.prompt: The guard walks behind the bar and descends the cellar stairs.
